revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Subpages}} [[Category:Special page templates]]<!-- Prefindex --> [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]]
}}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Subpages}} [[Category:Special page templates]]<!-- Prefindex --> [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Subpages}} [[Category:Special page templates]]<!-- Prefindex --> [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]]
}}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Subpages}} [[Category:Special page templates]]<!-- Prefindex --> [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]]
}}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Subpages}} [[Category:Special page templates]]<!-- Prefindex --> [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]]
}}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 6 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}}
<!-- EDIT TEMPLATE DOCUMENTATION BELOW THIS LINE -->
== Usage ==
=== Function ===
This template generates a link to all subpages of the page it is placed on, using [[Special:Prefixindex]]. It is mainly intended for WikiProjects or users wanting to track their subpages in an easy and convenient way.
=== Parameters ===
This template does not require any parameters; "<nowiki>{{subpages}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages}}". The label of the link is an optional parameter; "<nowiki>{{subpages|optional label}}</nowiki>" generates "{{subpages|optional label}}".
Use {{para|page}} to use the template to generate a list for another page: {{tnull|Subpages|1{{=}}All subpages of my talk page|page{{=}}User talk:ExampleUser}}
=== See also ===
* {{[[template:list subpages|list subpages]]}} (list subpages on the page, or list other subpages given a namespace or prefix)
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Subpages}} <!-- Prefindex -->
}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Special page templates]] [[Category:Search templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia formatting templates]] [[Category:internal link templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia subpage templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
